CustomField.description: Time from start of process to first Step change (in weekdays). Note that weekday calculations round up to the nearest whole day
CustomField.formula: (5 * ( FLOOR( ( DATEVALUE(FirstStepOrNOW__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( DATEVALUE(FirstStepOrNOW__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - (5 * ( FLOOR( ( DATEVALUE(FlowCreatedDate__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( DATEVALUE(FlowCreatedDate__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Time from start of process to first Step change (in weekdays). Note that weekday calculations round up to the nearest whole day
CustomField.label: Response Time (weekdays)
